body.text: Wednesday open: Virginia hardware-ban litigation is day 6 — four-suit landscape holds. Leider podcast day 3 of public release; ATF transport NPRM comment day 14 of 90; brace + EITB Week 3 day 3.

The structural picture is intact for the sixth day running. Gov. Spanberger's May 14 signing remains the dominant 2A storyline of 2026, with all four lawsuits on file and awaiting first scheduling activity. The Reload has published no new gun-policy stories since May 17.

facts.title: 1. VA hardware bans — day 6; four-suit landscape
2. ATF Leider podcast — public release day 3
3. ATF Sec. 926A transport NPRM — comment day 14 of 90

body.text:
• VA litigation day 6 — four-suit landscape holding; first scheduling order awaited
• Leider podcast day 3 of public release — settled into reference status
• DOJ Colorado AR-15/magazine suits — week 3 day 3; no docket activity
• CO Initiative 89 signature deadline T-10 (May 30) — rising attention
